summary: Q1 2026 earnings due tonight (April 29) after market close. Analyst consensus EPS ~$1.65, revenue ~$177.16B. Key narratives: AWS AI services hit $15B ARR in Q1. Anthropic committed to spend $100B+ on AWS over 10 years; Amazon investing $5B now + up to $20B more. Amazon Leo (satellite internet) acquired Globalstar and partnered with Apple for direct-to-device services. Tariffs expected to be a major discussion point (96% probability). Mizuho raised PT to street-high $325.
